category_title: Quietly observant students who listen to stories or watch peers solve math problems
scenario_title: Independent silent reading activity with adapted book
minimal_context: The student is sitting at their desk with an adapted book for an independent silent reading activity.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time for our independent silent reading activity. Your adapted book is on your desk.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sits quietly and watches other students complete their tasks.)

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Looks around the classroom, leaving the book untouched.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You should be reading your book now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (The adapted book remains closed on the desk while the student stares straight ahead.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time for our independent silent reading activity. Your adapted book is on your desk.

STUDENT: (Sits quietly and watches other students complete their tasks.)

TUTOR: Please begin reading.

STUDENT: (Looks around the classroom, leaving the book untouched.)

TUTOR: You should be reading your book now.

STUDENT: (The adapted book remains closed on the desk while the student stares straight ahead.)

context.materials: Adapted book on the student's desk, worksheets, pictures, speech-generating devices

challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: The book remained closed while the student stared straight ahead or looked around the classroom
